view.title: Validate explicit UC need #1
view.subtitle: Exploratory validation passed: The requirement for location selection by the customer is satisfied.

blocks.title: Uc Need Validate 1 completed
blocks.message: Exploratory validation passed: The requirement for location selection by the customer is satisfied.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step successfully validates the requirement of 'Location selection by customer' as evidenced by the linked use case, which explicitly states that patients can book at any location. Additionally, the prior step evidence shows that customers have successfully booked appointments, confirming that the system allows for location selection. The scenario provided in the use case further supports this by detailing the operational aspects of booking across multiple locations.
